title: Garlicky, Gooey Mediterranean Pasta Lasagna
description: A rich and satisfying flexitarian-friendly dish that combines the flavors of the Mediterranean with the comfort of lasagna.
instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add the sliced mushrooms and sauté for 4-5 minutes until tender.
Stir in the tomato sauce and bring to a simmer.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked lasagna noodles, tomato sauce mixture, and shredded Pecorino-Romano cheese.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a thin layer of tomato sauce.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the noodle-cheese mixture over the noodles.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of noodles on top.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
